purpose: Machine-readable WellFit product readiness matrix for future Codex/AI agents. It maps current product modules to readiness statuses, risk levels, leading files, blockers, safe next tasks, duplicate-system warnings, advancement checks, and human-approval needs so agents choose safer follow-up work without changing product logic or creating parallel architecture.

status_scale.not_started: No meaningful repo implementation or approved work plan exists yet.
status_scale.concept_only: Concept appears in planning/source material only; implementation must not be inferred without review.
status_scale.planned: Planned in registers/docs with known leading files, but implementation is not active enough for beta reliance.
status_scale.prototype: Prototype or preview exists; suitable for guarded iteration only, not final authority or production claims.
status_scale.active_beta: Usable beta baseline exists; safe changes must preserve guardrails and pass required checks.
status_scale.blocked: Work must stop until the named blocker or explicit human approval is resolved.
status_scale.review_required: Existing area needs human/legal/product/security review before material implementation or status advancement.
status_scale.production_ready: Production-ready by WellFit governance; do not assign this to critical or sensitive modules without explicit approval and evidence.

global_rules: Read AGENTS.md, CURRENT_PROJECT_STATE.md, WORK_MAP.md, TODO_INDEX.md, internal source maps, and relevant project-register files before planning implementation.
Do not modify product logic from this matrix; it is documentation, registry, and validation guidance only.
Do not duplicate existing architecture, app shells, mission engines, economy ledgers, Buddy provider layers, AR bridges, feedback loops, or agent governance.
Do not touch PR #13 or Unity files unless explicitly instructed by the repository owner.

Token, NFT, wallet, payment, betting, reward authority, mission-completion authority, health/watch, child/minor/family, exact location/GPS/radius/safe-zone, camera/AR image, face/pose/biometric, motion/raw sensor, privacy, consent, and compliance-sensitive areas require explicit human/legal/privacy approval before implementation.

modules.name: Landing / public website
current_blockers: Public messaging must stay beta-safe and avoid investment, token-sale, payment, or medical claims without review.
modules.next_safe_task: Tighten copy, route registration, accessibility, or responsive layout inside existing public pages without adding new public architecture.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not create a second marketing site, app shell, navigation system, or public route map.

modules.name: Registration / login
supporting_files: todolist/B - AKTUELLER SPRINT-STAND – LOGIN - REGISTRIERUNG - DEPLOYMENT
current_blockers: Authentication and identity work can affect privacy, consent, account safety, and backend security.

Register/User/Profile/Settings schema assumptions are documented, but exact runtime field names, duplicate avatar/profile.aiBuddy source-of-truth, permissions-vs-consent boundaries, and health-adjacent fields remain review_required before implementation.
modules.next_safe_task: After the docs-only schema baseline, perform an explicitly scoped read-only field-name reconciliation against existing registration/settings code and Firestore rules; do not change Auth, Firestore writes, profile/settings runtime behavior, or consent logic without a separate approved task.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not add a parallel auth system, duplicate login flow, or client-exposed secret configuration.

modules.name: Dashboard
current_blockers: Dashboard can display beta progress but must not become final ledger, reward, or health-data authority.
modules.next_safe_task: Improve display consistency, empty states, and route/register alignment while keeping economy data preview-only.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not create a second dashboard shell, progress model, or client-side source of reward truth.

modules.name: Missionen
current_blockers: Mission completion, anti-cheat, and rewards require server-side authority and evidence before any status advance; protected health/child/location/camera/face/motion/consent signals may be only review_required context/evidence, never direct authority.
Backend-readiness pass keeps persistence/final authority review_required; Functions syntax checks and preview APIs do not authorize final writes.
modules.next_safe_task: Consolidate existing mission copy, registry references, or preview UI without changing completion authority.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not create a parallel mission engine, reward-authority path, or anti-cheat model.

modules.name: Tagesmissionen
current_blockers: Daily missions must remain preview/beta and cannot authorize rewards entirely on the client.
Backend-readiness pass keeps persistence/final authority review_required; Functions syntax checks and preview APIs do not authorize final writes.
modules.next_safe_task: Improve daily mission guidance, evidence wording, or beta-state clarity in the existing route.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not fork daily missions into a separate client-only completion or reward subsystem.

modules.name: Wochenmissionen
current_blockers: Weekly aggregation and rewards need persistence, anti-cheat, and server review before production readiness.
modules.next_safe_task: Clarify weekly progress copy and registry links without adding final aggregation authority.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not create a second weekly challenge engine or unreviewed persistence model.

modules.name: Abenteuer
current_blockers: Adventure sequencing, persistence, and content scope are not production-validated.
modules.next_safe_task: Document existing adventure route behavior and small content gaps before implementing new mechanics.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not build a separate quest/adventure architecture outside the existing mission registry.

modules.name: Wettkaempfe / PvP
current_blockers: PvP can imply betting, stakes, payouts, anti-cheat, rankings, and financial-equivalent rewards; no production authority is approved.
modules.next_safe_task: Keep PvP as beta-safe planning/placeholder work; document guardrails and avoid stakes, payouts, or final reward claims.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not create a PvP stakes, betting, payout, or competition-reward subsystem.
required_checks_before_status_can_advanc: human review of PvP safety model

modules.name: Buddy / KI buddy
current_blockers: Buddy output must remain guidance/support; it cannot authorize rewards, medical advice, or mission completion.
modules.next_safe_task: Improve fallback messaging, provider documentation, or existing Buddy UI without adding reward authority.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not create a second AI provider layer, Buddy state model, or mission recommendation engine.

modules.name: Mobile web
current_blockers: Mobile UX must not activate token, NFT, trading, presale, live health/watch tracking, precise location/GPS/radius/safe-zone tracking, camera/face/pose/biometric collection, raw motion/sensor collection, consent-flow expansion, or final reward/mission-completion authority.
Health, child/minor/family, location, camera, face/pose/biometric, motion/raw sensor, privacy, and consent changes remain review_required before implementation.
First manual Mobile/PWA evidence exists, but Android device model/OS/Chrome version and route-by-route phone coverage remain missing_device_metadata/device_test_required.
modules.next_safe_task: First human Mobile/PWA evidence is recorded for Android Chrome /mobile/ar camera and Buddy appearance plus desktop responsive screenshots, but phone device model metadata and most phone route checks remain device_test_required; next run route-by-route phone tests for /mobile, /mobile/missionen, /mobile/buddy, /mobile/einstellungen, /mobile/bewegung, and /mobile/missionen/squat without changing runtime code, tracking, protected data, or reward/mission authority.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not build a separate mobile app shell or duplicate mobile route map.

modules.name: Mobile AR fallback
current_blockers: Camera/location/native AR expansion, pose/face/biometric signals, raw image/video storage, and AR reward signals require privacy, safety, consent, and authority review.
First /mobile/ar phone evidence is pass for camera start and Buddy appearance, but Buddy/AR final behavior remains expected_incomplete/review_required and device metadata is missing.
modules.next_safe_task: Use the recorded first manual Android Chrome evidence as a starting point: /mobile/ar camera starts and Buddy appears, while Buddy final behavior remains review_required/expected_incomplete; next collect device model/OS/Chrome version, controls, WebGL/camera layering, performance, fallback, and safety notes without Unity, camera persistence, location, or reward authority changes.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not add a second AR authority path, native bridge, camera capture, or location flow.
required_checks_before_status_can_advanc: privacy/safety review for camera and location scope

modules.name: Unity / WellFitBuddyAR
current_blockers: PR #13 must not be merged, closed, or depended on; Unity files must not be overwritten or deleted without explicit owner instruction.
modules.next_safe_task: Planning-only inventory from outside Unity files; do not edit native/unity/WellFitBuddyAR unless explicitly instructed.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not scaffold a replacement Unity project, overwrite Unity scripts, or bridge rewards directly from Unity events.
required_checks_before_status_can_advanc: explicit human approval for Unity/PR #13 scope

modules.name: Economy preview / internal points
current_blockers: Internal points remain beta/draft/preview; final ledger writes, token/NFT migration, wallet, payment, reward authority, and protected-data-based reward/completion decisions require explicit review.
Backend-readiness pass keeps persistence/final authority review_required; Functions syntax checks and preview APIs do not authorize final writes.
modules.next_safe_task: Strengthen documentation, previews, static guardrail checks, or emulator test plans without activating final writes.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not create a parallel ledger, token service, wallet, payment, NFT, or reward-authorization path.

modules.name: Points shop
current_blockers: Shop must remain internal-points preview only; no paid points, purchase, payout, token transfer, or real inventory grant is approved.
Backend-readiness pass keeps persistence/final authority review_required; Functions syntax checks and preview APIs do not authorize final writes.
modules.next_safe_task: Clarify preview-only shop copy and register links without adding payment or final spend authority.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not add a payment store, paid points purchase, NFT inventory, payout, or real purchase path.
required_checks_before_status_can_advanc: human approval for any paid or final-spend path

modules.name: Marketplace
current_blockers: Marketplace can imply NFT, token, trading, payment, payout, regulated economy, and settlement flows; no production marketplace is approved.
modules.next_safe_task: Keep route as placeholder/review-required and document what must be decided before implementation.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not create NFT marketplace, token trading, wallet, payment, settlement, or escrow systems.

modules.name: Leaderboard
current_blockers: Leaderboard needs privacy-aware aggregation and anti-cheat review before production use.
Backend-readiness pass keeps persistence/final authority review_required; Functions syntax checks and preview APIs do not authorize final writes.
modules.next_safe_task: Improve placeholder/beta presentation and privacy wording without exposing broad user data.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not add a separate ranking service, public user dump, or final competition payout logic.

modules.name: Analytics
current_blockers: Analytics must avoid unreviewed tracking, third-party analytics, personal data exposure, health/watch expansion, child/minor data, precise location, camera/face/biometric data, raw motion/sensor data, or permission/consent pressure.
modules.next_safe_task: Keep analytics aggregate/beta-safe and improve feedback or Adaptive User Insight planning documentation; do not add live tracking or raw user-data exposure.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not introduce an unreviewed analytics SDK, parallel feedback database, or personal tracking pipeline.

modules.name: User feedback
current_blockers: Feedback storage and analysis must be privacy-aware and not become an unreviewed personal-data pipeline.
modules.next_safe_task: Update feedback and Adaptive User Insight registries or audit documentation; avoid adding data collection endpoints unless explicitly assigned.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not create a second feedback register, analytics loop, or unreviewed feedback database.

modules.name: Firebase / backend / Firestore
current_blockers: Backend rules and final writes affect data security, rewards, economy, privacy, leaderboards, inventory, anti-cheat and mission completion; emulator coverage and human review are needed before production readiness.

`npm --prefix functions run check` is syntax/static evidence only and does not prove emulator authority, Firestore Rules hardening, deployment readiness, final persistence, reward authority or mission completion authority.
Existing server APIs remain preview/draft/status/projection-read-preview until an explicit approved backend/rules/audit plan verifies server-only writes and updates registers.
modules.next_safe_task: Plan Economy-Caps/Mission-Type-Caps/EconomyHealthScore in existing guardrail docs/registers only; do not activate final ledger writes, Firestore Rules hardening, Functions behavior, reward authority, mission completion, inventory grants, leaderboard authority, anti-cheat or deployments.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not add parallel backend authority, alternate Firestore schemas, or server secrets in frontend code.

modules.name: Legal / privacy / compliance
current_blockers: Legal, privacy, child safety, health/watch, camera/face/pose/biometric, raw motion/sensor, precise location/GPS/radius/safe-zone, payment, token, consent, and compliance messaging require human/legal/privacy review.
modules.next_safe_task: Planning-only cross-reference or typo-safe documentation updates; do not change runtime legal pages, consent flows, data collection, or legal meaning without explicit approval.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not create duplicate legal pages, privacy policies, consent flows, or compliance frameworks.

modules.name: Agent governance
current_blockers: Governance is active but must remain synchronized across human-readable docs, machine-readable registers, quality-gate scripts, inventory outputs, progress/work logs, and dry-run-only execution controls.
modules.next_safe_task: Maintain existing governance, readiness, inventory, Work Map, TODO index, progress/work logs, dry-run autopilot, batch, auto-merge, and auto-repair registers without changing product runtime behavior.
modules.do_not_duplicate_warning: Do not create a competing agent workflow, task queue, quality gate, or architecture map.
